ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data record */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  "energy_res1" REAL /* Energy consumption value */,
  "globalsolarrad_w_m2" INTEGER /* Global solar radiation in watts per square meter */,
  "relativehumidity" REAL /* Relative humidity percentage */,
  "windspeed10m_m_s" REAL /* Wind speed at 10 meters in meters per second */,
  "cluster2" INTEGER /* Cluster identifier for similar weather patterns */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the sensor that collected this data */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the forecast data */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the energy production data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES weather_sensor_data ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES energy_production ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES weather_forecasts ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "energy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy consumption record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data record */,
  "consumption_value" REAL /* Energy consumption value */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the consumption was recorded */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the sensor that collected this data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES weather_sensor_data ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solar_radiation" (
  "solar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solar radiation record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data record */,
  "radiation_value" INTEGER /* Solar radiation value in watts per square meter */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the radiation was recorded */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the sensor that collected this data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solar_radiation_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solar_radiation_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES weather_sensor_data ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "humidity" (
  "humidity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each humidity record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data record */,
  "humidity_value" REAL /* Humidity value percentage */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the humidity was recorded */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the sensor that collected this data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("humidity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_humidity_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES weather_sensor_data ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_humidity_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_speed" (
  "wind_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind speed record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data record */,
  "wind_speed_value" REAL /* Wind speed value in meters per second */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the wind speed was recorded */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the sensor that collected this data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wind_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_speed_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_speed_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES weather_sensor_data ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "cluster_description" TEXT /* Description of the weather pattern in the cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_sensor_data" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., Energy, Solar Radiation, Humidity, Wind Speed) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the sensor is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor */,
  "data_quality_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the data quality record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_sensor_data_data_quality_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_quality_id") REFERENCES data_quality ("data_quality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data record */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Forecasted temperature */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Forecasted humidity */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Forecasted wind speed */,
  "solar_radiation" INTEGER /* Forecasted solar radiation */,
  "forecast_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the forecast was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data record */,
  "production_value" REAL /* Amount of energy produced */,
  "production_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the energy was produced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_calibration" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the calibration was performed */,
  "calibration_result" TEXT /* Result of the calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_calibration_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES weather_sensor_data ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "data_quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the sensor */,
  "quality_status" TEXT /* Status of the data quality */,
  "quality_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data quality was checked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_quality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
